Start: inv(((🧄 ⊕ 🪆) ⊗ (🪆 ⊗ 🪼)))

Step 5: ((🪸 ⊗ 🪼) ⊕ inv(🪼)) = (inv(🪸 ⊕ 🪼) ⊕ inv(🪼))    [by definition of ⊗]

Final Output: 🦔

Step 5: (🧁 ⊗ (🫧 ⊛ (🧁 ⊕ 🧁))) = (🧁 ⊗ (🫧 ⊛ 🫧))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 6: (🧁 ⊗ (🫧 ⊛ 🫧)) = (🧁 ⊗ inv(🫧 ⊕ 🫧))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 7: (🧁 ⊗ inv(🫧 ⊕ 🫧)) = (🧁 ⊗ inv(🧊))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 8: (🧁 ⊗ inv(🧊)) = (🧁 ⊗ 🫧)    [by inv]
Step 9: (🧁 ⊗ 🫧) = 🐙    [by ⊗ table]

Final Output: 🐙

Step 9: inv((🪻 ⊛ (🪼 ⊕ (🪼 ⊞ 🐌)))) = inv((🪻 ⊛ (🪼 ⊕ 🐌)))    [by definition of ⊞]
Step 10: inv((🪻 ⊛ (🪼 ⊕ 🐌))) = inv((🪻 ⊛ 🪻))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 11: inv((🪻 ⊛ 🪻)) = inv(((🪻 ⊗ 🪻) ⊗ 🪻))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 12: inv(((🪻 ⊗ 🪻) ⊗ 🪻)) = inv(🪸 ⊗ 🪻)    [by ⊗ table]
Step 13: inv(🪸 ⊗ 🪻) = inv(🪻)    [by ⊗ table]
Step 14: inv(🪻) = 🐌    [by inv]

Final Output: 🐌

Step 9: (🦎 ⊛ (inv((🪨 ⊛ 🐌)) ⊗ 🪭)) = (🦎 ⊛ (inv(🐌) ⊗ 🪭))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 10: (🦎 ⊛ (inv(🐌) ⊗ 🪭)) = (🦎 ⊛ (🪤 ⊗ 🪭))    [by inv]
Step 11: (🦎 ⊛ (🪤 ⊗ 🪭)) = (🦎 ⊛ 🪤)    [by ⊗ table]
Step 12: (🦎 ⊛ 🪤) = inv(🦎 ⊕ 🪤)    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 13: inv(🦎 ⊕ 🪤) = inv(🪨)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 14: inv(🪨) = 🪭    [by inv]

Final Output: 🪭

Step 1: (inv((🪺 ⊗ 🐌)) ⊕ inv(inv(🥟))) = (inv(((🪺 ⊕ 🪺) ⊕ 🐌)) ⊕ inv(inv(🥟)))    [by definition of ⊗]
Step 2: (inv(((🪺 ⊕ 🪺) ⊕ 🐌)) ⊕ inv(inv(🥟))) = (inv((🪺 ⊕ 🐌)) ⊕ inv(inv(🥟)))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 3: (inv((🪺 ⊕ 🐌)) ⊕ inv(inv(🥟))) = (inv(🪺) ⊕ inv(inv(🥟)))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 4: (inv(🪺) ⊕ inv(inv(🥟))) = (🪺 ⊕ inv(inv(🥟)))    [by transformation "inv"]
Step 5: (🪺 ⊕ inv(inv(🥟))) = (🪺 ⊕ inv(🐌))    [by transformation "inv"]
Step 6: (🪺 ⊕ inv(🐌)) = (🪺 ⊕ 🌵)    [by transformation "inv"]
Step 7: (🪺 ⊕ 🌵) = 🪺    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🪺

Step 8: (🪆 ⊗ rot((🫑 ⊞ rot(rot((🐌 ⊗ 🫑)))))) = (🪆 ⊗ rot((🫑 ⊞ rot(rot(🪆)))))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 9: (🪆 ⊗ rot((🫑 ⊞ rot(rot(🪆))))) = (🪆 ⊗ rot((🫑 ⊞ rot(🪤))))    [by rot]
Step 10: (🪆 ⊗ rot((🫑 ⊞ rot(🪤)))) = (🪆 ⊗ rot((🫑 ⊞ 🧊)))    [by rot]
Step 11: (🪆 ⊗ rot((🫑 ⊞ 🧊))) = (🪆 ⊗ rot(🫑))    [by definition of ⊞, ⊕ table]
Step 12: (🪆 ⊗ rot(🫑)) = (🪆 ⊗ 🐌)    [by rot]
Step 13: (🪆 ⊗ 🐌) = 🪆    [by ⊗ table]

Final Output: 🪆

Step 9: (🪵 ⊞ rot((🥟 ⊛ rot(🧁)))) = (🪵 ⊞ rot((🥟 ⊛ 🐙)))    [by rot table]
Step 10: (🪵 ⊞ rot((🥟 ⊛ 🐙))) = (🪵 ⊞ rot(((🥟 ⊗ 🥟) ⊗ 🐙)))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 11: (🪵 ⊞ rot(((🥟 ⊗ 🥟) ⊗ 🐙))) = (🪵 ⊞ rot(🫧 ⊗ 🐙))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 12: (🪵 ⊞ rot(🫧 ⊗ 🐙)) = (🪵 ⊞ rot(🪭))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 13: (🪵 ⊞ rot(🪭)) = (🪵 ⊞ 🪵)    [by rot table]
Step 14: (🪵 ⊞ 🪵) = inv(🪵 ⊕ 🪵)    [by definition of ⊞]
Step 15: inv(🪵 ⊕ 🪵) = inv(🪵)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 16: inv(🪵) = 🧁    [by inv table]

Final Output: 🧁

Step 5: (🦔 ⊛ (🪺 ⊕ (🪣 ⊕ 🪣))) = (🦔 ⊛ (🪺 ⊕ 🪵))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 6: (🦔 ⊛ (🪺 ⊕ 🪵)) = (🦔 ⊛ 🪺)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 7: (🦔 ⊛ 🪺) = ((🦔 ⊗ 🦔) ⊗ 🪺)    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 8: ((🦔 ⊗ 🦔) ⊗ 🪺) = (🦔 ⊗ 🪺)    [by ⊗ table]
Step 9: (🦔 ⊗ 🪺) = 🪣    [by ⊗ table]

Final Output: 🪣

Step 8: inv(rot((🪭 ⊞ (🫐 ⊞ 🫑)))) = inv(rot((🪭 ⊞ ((🫐 ⊗ 🫐) ⊗ 🫑))))    [by definition of ⊞]
Step 9: inv(rot((🪭 ⊞ ((🫐 ⊗ 🫐) ⊗ 🫑)))) = inv(rot((🪭 ⊞ (🫐 ⊗ 🫑))))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 10: inv(rot((🪭 ⊞ (🫐 ⊗ 🫑)))) = inv(rot((🪭 ⊞ 🪭)))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 11: inv(rot((🪭 ⊞ 🪭))) = inv(rot(( (🪭 ⊗ 🪭) ⊗ 🪭 )))    [by definition of ⊞]
Step 12: inv(rot(( (🪭 ⊗ 🪭) ⊗ 🪭 ))) = inv(rot((🪭 ⊗ 🪭)))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 13: inv(rot((🪭 ⊗ 🪭))) = inv(rot(🪭))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 14: inv(rot(🪭)) = inv(🧿)    [by rot]
Step 15: inv(🧿) = 🫑    [by inv]

Final Output: 🫑

Step 8: (inv(🌵) ⊗ rot(((🧿 ⊛ 🦎) ⊕ inv(🦎)))) = (🪈 ⊗ rot(((🧿 ⊛ 🦎) ⊕ inv(🦎))))    [by inv]
Step 9: (🪈 ⊗ rot(((🧿 ⊛ 🦎) ⊕ inv(🦎)))) = (🪈 ⊗ rot((🪻) ⊕ inv(🦎)))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 10: (🪈 ⊗ rot((🪻) ⊕ inv(🦎))) = (🪈 ⊗ rot((🪻) ⊕ 🪻))    [by inv]
Step 11: (🪈 ⊗ rot((🪻) ⊕ 🪻)) = (🪈 ⊗ rot(🦎))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 12: (🪈 ⊗ rot(🦎)) = (🪈 ⊗ 🌵)    [by rot]
Step 13: (🪈 ⊗ 🌵) = 🧶    [by ⊗ table]

Final Output: 🧶

Step 8: (🧄 ⊕ ((🪆 ⊕ (🫑 ⊕ 🫑)) ⊞ rot(🪸))) = (🧄 ⊕ ((🪆 ⊕ 🫑) ⊞ rot(🪸)))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 9: (🧄 ⊕ ((🪆 ⊕ 🫑) ⊞ rot(🪸))) = (🧄 ⊕ (🪸 ⊞ rot(🪸)))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 10: (🧄 ⊕ (🪸 ⊞ rot(🪸))) = (🧄 ⊕ (🪸 ⊞ 🦎))    [by rot]
Step 11: (🧄 ⊕ (🪸 ⊞ 🦎)) = (🧄 ⊕ 🦎)    [by definition of ⊞, ⊕ table]
Step 12: (🧄 ⊕ 🦎) = 🫑    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🫑

Step 9: (rot((🧲 ⊕ 🪬)) ⊞ inv(rot((🥟 ⊗ 🪭)))) = (rot(🧲) ⊞ inv(rot((🥟 ⊗ 🪭))))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 10: (rot(🧲) ⊞ inv(rot((🥟 ⊗ 🪭)))) = (🧊 ⊞ inv(rot((🥟 ⊗ 🪭))))    [by rot]
Step 11: (🧊 ⊞ inv(rot((🥟 ⊗ 🪭)))) = (🧊 ⊞ inv(rot(🥟)))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 12: (🧊 ⊞ inv(rot(🥟))) = (🧊 ⊞ inv(🪭))    [by rot]
Step 13: (🧊 ⊞ inv(🪭)) = (🧊 ⊞ 🧊)    [by inv]
Step 14: (🧊 ⊞ 🧊) = ((🧊 ⊕ 🧊) ⊕ 🧊)    [by definition of ⊞]
Step 15: ((🧊 ⊕ 🧊) ⊕ 🧊) = (🪬 ⊕ 🧊)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 16: (🪬 ⊕ 🧊) = 🪬    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🪬
